sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	荀彧 (文若)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	荀彧 (文若)


	 Pronunciation 
	Xun2 Yu4 (Wen2ruo4) 


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Xún Yù (Wénruò)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Hsün Yü (Wên-jo)

	 Birthplace 
	Yinghang in Yingchuan

	 Name Notes 
	The reason we have Xun Yu and Xun “You” is because, though the sounds are the same (both Yu), they’re pronounced Yu4 and Yu1, the You idea, I suppose, comes in for foreign readers who cannot see the tones.

full_text:
Xun Yu (Wenruo) 荀彧 (文若)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Yu (荀彧), styledWenruo (文若), was born in Yinghang in Yingchuan. Cousin of Xun You. A very talented advisor under Cao Cao who helped stabilize China. Xun Yu was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and the Wei Kingdom. Xun Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
